titleStmt.title: SII 9.119: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 119. (A.R. No. 677 of 1922.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE TEMPLE OF KOLLAMBHARATI ON A HILLOCK NEAR KOTTAPALLE, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 980, Hēmaḷambi, Vaiśākha, śu. puṇṇami, Bṛihaspativāra, Vyatīpāta, Sōma-grahaṇa. The date is not regular. In Hēmaḷamba, Vaiśakha, śu. 15 corresponded to A.D. 1057 April 21, Monday, not Thursday, with no eclipse. There was, however, a lunar eclipse in Chaitra, i.e., on March 23, Sunday. The inscription refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Traiḷōkyamalladēva and records that the king, with his queen Maiḷaladēvī, and Ballavarasa, came to Śrīśaila and, in the presence of the god Mallikārjuna, washed the feet of Surēśvara-Paṇḍita with the water poured by the queen, made the gift of the village Duddhiyāla in Kanne threehundred, for the service of the god Svayambhu-Bhairavadēva at Koḷḷa situated at the western gate of Śrīśaila and for a feeding house; the village Siripura was granted for the service of the god Sāraṅgēśvaradēva and for a feeding house and the village Kuṟukunde for the service of the god Indrēśvaradēva and for a feeding house. The boundaries of the villages are given in the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha ma
hārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkya
malladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi
pravardhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire
tatpādapadmōpajīvi svastyanavarataparamakalyāṇā
bhyudayasahaśraphaḷabhōgabhāgini dvitīyalakṣmī
viḷāsini śōḍaśadānacintāmaṇi savatimadabhaṁjani sa
mastāntaḻpuramukhamaṇḍani śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladē
vaviśāḷavakṣasthaḷanivāsiniyarappa śrīmatpi
riyarasi maiḷaladēviyaruṁ śrīballavarasaruṁ śrī
manmallikārjunadēvarallige bijayaṁgeydu pātā
ḷagaṁgeyaṁ mindu śrīmanmallikārjjunadēvara sanni
dhānadoḷ . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyāna
dhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhāṇapārāyaṇajapasamādhi
saṁpannarmmadamattamātaṁgakaṇṭhīravarkrōdhēndha
namahānaḷarmmōhamahīruhapraḷe
yakālamahāmārutarkkāḷāmukhasama
yasarōvararājahaṁsarllākuḷasiddhāntanayyā
yikanaḷinīdivākararmmadhyāhnakalpavrikṣa
rggurukuḷasamuddharaṇar śrīśaiḷapaścima
dvāratōraṇarmmallikārjjunadēvadarśanakāraṇapu
ruṣar kiṭṭigāveya saṁbandhi mosaṁgiya
brahmēśvaradācāryyarggaṁgarāsibhaṭṭārakara śisyar

śrīmat surēśvarapaṇḍitadēvargge śrīmattraiḷōkya
malladēvarkkālgarccalu śrīmatpiriyara
si maiḷaladēviyarkkālgeṟeyalu sakavarṣa 980 ne
ya hēmaḷaṁbisaṁvatsarada vaiśākha suddha puṇnami
brihaspativāradaṁdu vyatīpāta sōmagrahaṇa
nimittadiṁ śrīśaiḷapaścimadvārada koḷḷada Ādisvayaṁbhu
bhairavadēvarggamalliyavāriśatrakkaṁ sarvvanamaśyamāge
biṭṭa kannemūnūṟaṟa baḷiya duddhiyālu sāraṁgē
śvaradēvarggamalliya śatrakkaṁ sarvvanamaśyamāge
biṭṭa siripuraṁ śrīmadiṁdrēśvaradēvarggama
lliya Avāriśatrakaṁ sarvvanamasyamāgi
biṭṭa kuṟukunde duddiyāla siripuravanteraḍaṟa
sīmāsammaṁdhamentendoḍe pūrvvadiśābhāgakke
puttuṁ muttadamaradalliṁda nivrittidoṟeyaṁ pāydu
kiṟidantaramaṁ pūrvvābhimukhamāgi pōgi Ātukū
riṁge pōda baṭṭeya kelada puttugaḷaṁ murttiya
muttadamaraṁgaḷu mēre Āgnēyadiśābhāga
kke Ātukūra suralūra mugguḍḍeya piriya pu
ttugaḷuṁ tāṟiyakaḷavina maraṁgaḷu mē
re . dakṣiṇadiśābhāgakke Alliṁda paścimābhi
mukhamāgi banda nettidoṟe mēreyāgi sura
lūra Isukalla mugguḍḍeyoḷ bhīmarāsi kaṭṭi
dā keṟe mēreyāgi kaḍavinakūṁṭeyiṁ paḍuva
muṁdhāgi bandu Iliyindayamaranuṁ puttuṁ mēre
nairityadiśābhāgakke Alliṁda paścimābhimukhamāgi
pōgi duddhikālveyaṁ pāydu kiṟidaṁtaṟamaṁ paḍuvamu
ndāgi pōgi Isukalligaṁ gāṇadapāḷiṁgaṁ mugguḍḍe
ya kokkaraveṁceya baṭṭeya kelada puttuṁ

ddeyumaṁ
paścimadiśābhāgake
koḷḷada dēvargge honna
lūriṁge piriya
ya Āṟakuṁ
ṭi mēre vāyāvya
ke Alliṁduttarābhimu
khamāgi valūriṁ
da pōpa baṭṭiya kela
da puttuṁ koṟinduvi
na mēre U
ttaradiśābhāgakke ka
nnekalliṁ bāva
riṁge mugguḍḍeyippa
puttuṁ mutta
mēre Īśānyadiśā
bhāgakke Alliṁda dakṣiṇā
bhimukha mēlāgiyuṁ
kūṁṭeya mūḍaṇa
kōḍiyiṁdaṁ pū
rvvābhimukhadiṁ śrī
dharayyana keṟeya
muṁdāgi pōgi Ā
tukūriṁgaṁ nandikē
na mugguḍḍeya
bidira paḷḷamuṁ
koṭṭaru . svadattaṁ
paradattaṁ vā yō
harēti vasundharāṁ
ṣaṣṭirvvariṣasa
haśrāyāṁ
viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē krimiḥ .
baddhasya trīṇi
cihnāni dēva
nayā
cikaṁ maṇḍalī
kanamaṁtrāṇi
kīrtimān
bhavēt . tā
kikācāra tiḷa
ktaṁ yōgā
cāravivarjitaṁ
niṣkaḷācārasaṁ
pannaṁ nirācāraḥ
sayucyatē .
bahubhirvvasudhā
bhuktā rājabhissa
garādibhiḥ ya
sya yasya yadā
bhūmi tasya ta
sya tadā phalaṁ .
sāmānyōyaṁ
dharmmasēturnri
pāṇāṁ kāḷē kā
ḷē pāḷanīyō bha
vadbhiḥ sarvvānētā
nbhāvinaḥ pārtthivēṁ
drān bhūyō bhū
yō yācatē
rāmacaṁdraḥ . maṁ
gaḷa mahāśrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.119 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
